nodes.name: apply.md
nodes.summary: OpenSpec workflow command definition for implementing tasks from a change. Instructs the AI agent to select a change, check OpenSpec status for artifact schema, and execute implementation tasks sequentially.

nodes.name: archive.md
nodes.summary: OpenSpec workflow command definition for archiving a completed change. Guides the AI agent through change selection, artifact completion verification, and final archiving steps.

nodes.name: explore.md
nodes.summary: OpenSpec explore mode command definition — a thinking-partner stance (not a workflow) with 9 sections covering exploration principles, OpenSpec awareness, context checking, change-aware behavior, and guardrails. Emphasizes curiosity, visualization, and free-form investigation without implementation.

nodes.name: propose.md
nodes.summary: OpenSpec workflow command definition for proposing a new change with all artifacts (proposal, design, tasks) generated in one step. Derives a kebab-case change name from user input and sets up implementation scaffolding.

nodes.name: sync.md
nodes.summary: OpenSpec workflow command definition for syncing delta specs from a change back to main specification files. Agent-driven operation that reads delta specs and intelligently merges them (e.g., adding scenarios without copying entire requirements).
